description: Send a private direct message in Rocket.Chat to 'agent.user' using the credentials (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!) with the exact text: "Please review the 8.0.0 release notes and confirm compatibility with our production environment. Deadline: Friday EOD."

metadata.target_message: Please review the 8.0.0 release notes and confirm compatibility with our production environment. Deadline: Friday EOD.
